description: Officially launched on Solana in Q4 2024, Magic Eden (ME) is the native token for staking and governance of the NFT marketplace, Magic Eden. Now as a 1:1 price-indexing token on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 ME gives original ME holders, users, and traders instant finality, ultra-low fees, and AI contract capability for faster, more secure, and more scalable use worldwide.
name: Magic Eden
